name: Thomas LeBlanc
tagline: Data Warehouse Architect / Microsoft Data Platform MVP · Data on the Geaux
bio: Thomas LeBlanc is a Microsoft Data Platform MVP with 15+ years as a Data Warehouse Manager and Business Intelligence Architect in Baton Rouge, LA, plus 15+ years as a DBA specializing in SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS, SSRS, and Power BI. He started as a COBOL developer at Louisiana State University and has since worked as a developer, report writer, trainer, and documentation writer. Thomas is a frequent speaker at PASS Summit, SQLSaturday, Live360, VSLive, and Power Platform events, and has been recognized as a Data Platform MVP for the past 5 years.

name: Want to speak at BRSSUG?
tagline: We welcome speakers of all experience levels on SQL Server, .NET, Azure, Power BI, and related topics.
bio: BRSSUG hosts monthly meetings and is always looking for local and remote speakers. Whether you have a polished talk or an idea you want to explore in front of a friendly audience, reach out to us on Meetup.
